subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Through the grace and bounty of the All-Merciful, thou art firm in the Covenant and thou shalt assuredly give voice to divine utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از فضل و موهبت رحمن بر میثاق ثابتی و البته ناطق گردی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @firmness in the Covenant
